title: Supreme Court takes suo motu cognisance of illegal sand mining in Chambal sanctuary
description: The Supreme Court on Friday took suo motu cognisance of illegal sand mining in the national Chambal sanctuary.A Bench comprising of Justice Vikram Nath and Justice Sandeep Mehta noted the serious threat posed to endangered aquatic wildlife, including the critically endangered Gharial."We have taken note of some recent newspaper reports and the report submitted by CSR which required that the entire protected areas where ghadiyal preservation program is going on, they are being rampantly mined, th
